Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Lightcaster IV]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Captain ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 3''' — The protagonist uses a weapon called the Lightcaster IV.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 8''' — The Lightcaster IV is a plasma pistol that works in any atmosphere.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 11''' — Varic uses a Lightcaster to shoot bolts.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 13''' — The Captain uses a Lightcaster to cast barriers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 14''' — A Lightcaster is a weapon that fires shots.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 23''' — The narrator possesses a Lightcaster hidden in a warded pocket.}}

== The Engineer ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 12''' — The narrator uses a Lightcaster.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 15''' — The narrator possesses a Lightcaster IV.}}

== The Knight ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 3''' — Lightcasters are weapons that work anywhere.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 22''' — The Lightcaster IV is a plasma pistol.}}

== The Pilot ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 20''' — The Lightcaster is a pistol used by the narrator.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 26''' — The narrator uses a Lightcaster when enemies get too close.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 36''' — Omega can conjure a Lightcaster.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
